summary: Set 048 Session 3 ships the copyable-prompt commands + context-menu IA refresh per audit-locked spec §3.2 + §3.3 + §3.9, combined into one session per operator's Bias 7 disposition. The cursor-anchored HTML popup that Set 034 introduced is retired in favor of native vscode.window.showQuickPick (Bias 3 FLIP). Four new copy-prompt commands shipped (dabbler.copySpecReviewPrompt + dabbler.copySessionAccomplishmentsPrompt + dabbler.copySetAccomplishmentsPrompt + dabbler.copyStartNextSessionPrompt) under the L1 path-reference format with the §3.9 review-criteria carve-out (operator-authored meta-instructions embedded; session-set artifacts referenced by path). ActionRegistry reshaped from 15 to 14 entries with a new ActionCategory discriminator (openFile | copyEval | flat); L2 locks the Open File submenu to exactly 4 entries; L3 fully removes openAiAssignment from the menu + command registration + COMMAND_ALLOWLIST + package.json + test fixtures; L4 close-on-blur is a free byproduct of QuickPick; L5 left-click dual-action (always opens spec.md; non-terminal rows also copy 'Start the next session of <slug>.' + info toast) wired in handleActivateRow. Pure decision logic extracted to rowMenuHelpers.ts (buildTopLevelItems + buildSubmenuItems + planLeftClickActivation) for unit-testability. Cross-provider verification (sonnet route + gemini-pro verify, $0.161 routed) returned ISSUES_FOUND with 8 findings; gemini-pro confirmed VERIFIED for review quality. 6 of 8 findings dispositioned via in-flight code fixes (slug backtick-sanitize in both prompt + clipboard paths; unknown-state fail-CLOSED via positive in-progress|not-started check; .slice() removal; copyToClipboard try/catch; set-prompt activity-log omission comment; allowlist purpose comment). 2 of 8 dispositioned via documentation tightening (§3.9 carve-out clarified; dabblerKind/kind interface comment expanded). 3 new regression tests lock in the in-flight fixes. 665 TS pass + 2 pre-existing failures unchanged from S2 close-out; 994 Python collected (no Python changes in S3). Cumulative Set 048 spend $0.411 of $10 NTE (4.1%).

reason.specifics: Set 048 Session 4 (doc revision + per-consumer migrator + bootstrap tier-branch) builds on S3's QuickPick + copy-prompt surface. S4 lands: (a) bootstrap Step 4.5 + schema doc § Tier Expectations + workflow doc Step 6 + authoring guide tri-state docs; (b) agent-capability documentation per §3.2 citing the now-shipped commands; (c) per-consumer-repo migrator CLI per §3.7 for Lightweight-shape state files (sessionLog[] from great-psalms-scroll-font + any others catalogued by source-tree enumeration); (d) Dabbler: Get Started wizard tier-branch (E8) opening the appropriate Lightweight or Full path; (e) cross-repo notice for Lightweight consumer paste-in; (f) review-criteria template files for §3.9 (docs/review-criteria/{spec,session,set}.md template versions); (g) external-verification command per §3.8.
